title: signed/unsigned mixed calculation with WIDTH warning off

features.name: mixed signed unsigned addition with unsigned result
features.description: Code should include a mixed signed/unsigned addition where an unsigned wire (8-bit) is added to a signed wire (4-bit, value -1), with the result assigned to an unsigned wire

features.name: narrow_signed_to_wider_unsigned_assignment
features.description: Code should include a signed narrow signal (-1) being combined with a wider unsigned signal in an expression, where the result is stored in an unsigned wider signal
